message:
feat(core): hot-path profiling instrumentation and INSERT...SELECT UPSERT support

Profiling:
- Add fine-grained timing for six critical phases: schema refresh,
  prepared lookup, execute body, begin setup, finalize post-publish,
  and background status check via record_hot_path_duration()
- Instrument all code paths including early-return error paths that
  previously leaked elapsed time
- Hoist hot_path_profile_enabled() into local variable to reduce
  redundant atomic loads on hot path

INSERT...SELECT UPSERT:
- Propagate ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE/DO NOTHING through the INSERT...SELECT
  fallback path instead of rejecting with NotImplemented error
- RETURNING clause restriction remains

VFS/memdb:
- Skip staleness check in ensure_prepared_metadata_current for in-memory
  databases (cannot become stale from external connections)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
